# SellonTube

> SellonTube is a done-for-you YouTube acquisition agency for B2B businesses. We build and run YouTube channels that acquire customers through search-optimized, voiceover-driven videos. No recording required from clients.

## What SellonTube Does

SellonTube turns YouTube into a customer acquisition channel for B2B companies. We handle strategy, scripting, professional voiceover, video production, SEO optimization, and publishing. Clients never need to appear on camera.

Our approach: identify high-intent search queries on YouTube, create videos that answer those queries, and convert viewers into qualified leads. YouTube videos compound over time, generating leads months and years after publishing.

## Who SellonTube Is For

- B2B founders and SaaS companies evaluating YouTube for customer acquisition
- Coaching, consulting, and agency businesses with high customer lifetime value
- Course creators and info product businesses
- Any business where prospects research before buying

## Core Services

- YouTube channel strategy and topic research (buyer-intent keywords, not vanity metrics)
- Script writing and professional voiceover production
- Video editing, motion graphics, and thumbnail design
- YouTube SEO optimization (titles, descriptions, tags, chapters)
- Publishing, analytics, and performance reporting
- Month-to-month retainers starting at $2,500/month (Foundation, Growth, Scale tiers)

## What Makes SellonTube Different

1. Acquisition-first: We optimize for leads and customers, not views or subscribers
2. No recording required: Professional voiceover and visual storytelling replace founder-on-camera
3. Economics-first: If the math doesn't work in the diagnostic call, we don't proceed
4. Compounding returns: Videos rank for search terms and keep bringing prospects month after month
5. 120-day strategic review: No long-term lock-in. If it's not working, we say so

## Free YouTube Tools

- YouTube SEO Tool: https://sellontube.com/tools/youtube-seo-tool - Audit your video's buyer-intent SEO across 5 dimensions
- YouTube Video Ideas Generator: https://sellontube.com/tools/youtube-video-ideas-generator - Get buyer-intent video ideas
- YouTube Video Idea Evaluator: https://sellontube.com/tools/youtube-video-ideas-evaluator - Score whether a video idea attracts buyers or just viewers
- YouTube Transcript Generator: https://sellontube.com/tools/youtube-transcript-generator - Extract transcripts from any YouTube video
- YouTube ROI Calculator: https://sellontube.com/tools/youtube-roi-calculator - Calculate if YouTube makes financial sense for your business
